tick_over_tick_delta_vs_1430.interpretation: STRATEGY QUIET TICK #5 on entry/exit cadence. FIFTH consecutive 30-min window with zero new BUY, zero new SELL, zero new submission. The cap-induced silence narrative (from 13:30/14:00/14:30) holds — with the 0.65 deployed cap binding 7.50 pp under full-fill projection and three OPEN orders sitting aged at limit prices, no organic admission path exists. Live SL activity diversified this tick: aggressive trail-UP on TORNTPOWER (+57 bps despite no LTP improvement) and defensive WIDEN on PNBHOUSING (-65 bps after LTP pullback) and NESTLEIND (-35 bps after LTP pullback) — strategy decision layer is DEMONSTRABLY adapting tactically to MTM drift, mixing tightening and loosening per name. Book gave back another ₹725 (-22 bps) over the window — second consecutive observed erosion — driven primarily by PNBHOUSING -₹420 (-53 bps), HINDUNILVR -₹90 (-19 bps), POWERGRID -₹120 (-25 bps), partially offset by MAHABANK +₹144 (+14 bps), TORNTPOWER +₹6, NTPC -₹25.50, NESTLEIND -₹110.50. Net dispersion: 5 weakening vs 2 strengthening (improved from 6/3 at 14:30). Risk level HELD at MEDIUM, NOT raised to HIGH because: (a) Trigger D composite firing requires 2+ legs and only the silence leg fires; book-positive +0.23% (74 bps above the -0.5% leg-fire line) and no-distress (MAHABANK 4.42 pp from -7%) means the composite cannot reach HIGH; (b) the order ageing (now 45-77 min past flags) has a strategy-layer remedy (cancel-vs-reprice), not a risk-monitor lever response; (c) deployment cap is doing exactly what it was set to do — bind admissions until SELL frees deployment; (d) live SL activity confirms decision-layer health. Risk level NOT lowered to LOW because: (a) all three OPEN orders increasingly past their age-flag thresholds, (b) book in second consecutive retracement (cumulative -₹1,224 over 60 min from 13:42 high), (c) deployment cap remains binding, (d) Power cluster 4-name structure persists at 2.28 pp buffer, (e) three filled holdings now have sub-1% SL buffers (NESTLEIND 68, POWERGRID 72, SUNPHARMA 74 bps).

actions_taken: NO LEVER CHANGES. TRIGGER D FIRES 1-of-3 LEGS → NO ACTION. The silence leg crosses the 2h45m mark (165 min observed); however, composite distress requires 2+ legs concurrent. Documenting the 1-of-3 firing rather than acting on it preserves trigger discipline. Re-arm conditions for 2-of-3: book P&L slips below -0.5% (~₹7,310 erosion required from current +₹2,288 — gap COMPRESSED ₹721 from 14:30) OR MAHABANK breaches -7% (LTP drop from ₹79.40 to ₹75.79). Neither imminent, but book pullback rate is worth tracking.
